title: Sensor Location Embedding
summary: A learnable embedding that encodes which sensor/body location a data window comes from. Critical for HAR when training with multiple sensor positions but testing with a single unknown position per sample.
when_to_use: Multi-sensor HAR where sensor identity varies between train/test
Any problem where a categorical context variable (device type, user group, sensor ID) should modulate how the model interprets the time series
Analogous to segment embeddings in BERT or modality tokens in multimodal models
